title: SciSpace – CRISPR
query: What is the current state of CRISPR gene editing?

answer.text: CRISPR-Cas9 has shown remarkable precision in targeting specific genomic sequences. Off-target effects remain a significant concern.

paragraphs.text: CRISPR-Cas9 has shown remarkable precision in targeting specific genomic sequences.
Off-target effects remain a significant concern.

citations.title: A programmable dual-RNA-guided DNA endonuclease in adaptive bacterial immunity
Multiplex genome engineering using CRISPR/Cas systems
